{"permit_number":"PMT25-20869","address":"7165 E UNIVERSITY DR 155","description":"Please note that before a damage permit is issued an estimate showing the 
Company doing the work, the subject address, scope of work, materials, and labor from either the contractor or the 
insurance company will be required. A written scope of work is required to approximate the cost of the permit, verbal 
estimations shall not be used. This structure is to be restored like for like in compliance with 2017 NEC, 2018 IRC/IBC 
requirements. Any alterations or changes will require submitting plans before any restoration can begin. During the 
damage inspection the following was observed: Structural members were damaged by and will need stamped 
engineering. Electrical sustained minor damage . Replace damaged wire per 2017 NEC and/or 2018 IRC/IBC.

description:
An At-risk grading permit can be requested to start grading work prior to construction permit issuance and approval from the Civil division.  However, NO work besides grading can be done with an at-risk grading permit.  No structures, piping, trenching, etc. may be constructed under the AR permit.  Additionally, no utilities can be installed with an at-risk grading permit.

ADEQ NOI and Maricopa County Dust Control permit, and the contractor verification form are required.   
 
This project is an approximate 50.5-arcre development consisting of 1 industrial building with associated truck and vehicular parking.
source: Mesa AZ – Commercial Building Permits (JSON)
